summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B2B Catalog ordering feature for Printout e-commerce. All 13 backend API tests passed (POST /api/catalog/order, GET /api/catalog/orders). All frontend tests passed: /foretag page loads with hero section, catalog type cards, order form; selecting Fysisk katalog shows address fields and quantity; selecting Digital katalog hides them; form submission works for both types with correct success messages; Navbar 'Företag' link navigates to /foretag; Admin 'Kataloger' menu at /admin/catalogs displays all orders.
critical_code_review_comments: catalog.py: POST /order correctly validates required fields, generates UUID order_id, sets status to 'pending', excludes MongoDB _id from response
catalog.py: GET /orders correctly sorts by created_at descending (newest first), excludes _id
BusinessCatalog.js: Conditional rendering of address fields and quantity based on selectedType works correctly
BusinessCatalog.js: Form validation checks required fields and address for physical catalog before submission
BusinessCatalog.js: Success messages correctly differentiate between physical (5-7 arbetsdagar) and digital (24 timmar) delivery
AdminCatalogs.js: Correctly fetches and displays orders with proper formatting for both catalog types
Navbar.js: 'Företag' link with data-testid='nav-business' correctly navigates to /foretag
AdminLayout.js: 'Kataloger' menu item correctly links to /admin/catalogs
seed_data_creation: Created test catalog orders during testing (both physical and digital types)
context_for_next_testing_agent: B2B Catalog ordering feature fully tested. POST /api/catalog/order creates orders with company_name, contact_person, email, phone, catalog_type (physical/digital), optional address fields for physical, quantity, message. GET /api/catalog/orders returns all orders sorted newest first. Frontend /foretag page has two catalog type cards, form with conditional address fields for physical type, quantity controls (max 5), success confirmation with type-specific messages. Admin /admin/catalogs shows all orders with full details.

Backend POST /api/catalog/order.Digital catalog order: ✓ Creates order with minimal required fields
Backend POST /api/catalog/order.Physical catalog order: ✓ Creates order with address, postal_code, city, quantity

Backend GET /api/catalog/orders.Contains all fields: ✓ All order fields present in response

Frontend /foretag page.Page loads: ✓ Hero section, catalog cards, form visible
Frontend /foretag page.Fysisk katalog selection: ✓ Shows address fields and quantity controls
Frontend /foretag page.Form submission (digital): ✓ Success message mentions e-post inom 24 timmar
Frontend /foretag page.Form submission (physical): ✓ Success message mentions 5-7 arbetsdagar till angiven adress

Frontend Admin /admin/catalogs.Orders displayed: ✓ Shows all catalog orders with details
